1. VLADIMIR K U Z N E T S O V (ASSIGNED 201-0943610) IS
rosstaut ipiirxc tuxrh vLpmnrR sRerevct kuzeirsov, A GRu srArf eie
POSSIBLY IDENTICAL WITH VLADIMIR SERGEYEVICH KUZNETSOV, A GRU STAFF
a- rrx ccofpe ro esroA, s or or L7o vupxtizRge
2. FYI: ACCORDING TO (PD)STORAGE, AS OF OCT 67, VLADIMIR
seteavyvrch ruirsov eup rt flk or tMert-iioR ip ts eee
SERGEYEVICH KUZNETSOV HELD THE RANK OF ENGINEER-MAJOR AND WAS
rissreiieo ro rt tro aiuel-o-AtRxy mREcrotRre Ar rte GRu H-
ASSIGNED TO THE THIRD (ANGLO-AMERICAN) DIRECTORATE AT THE GRU HEAD-
quARrtns n nosoi sonrn EARL-xeR e7i, kuzirsoy rreipy
QUARTERS IN MOSCOW. SOMETIME EARLIER IN 1967, KUZNETSOV ATTENDED
r nr-rrAsY pxeLoniAric acpsn- e fy-v ,.
THE MILITARY DIPLOMATIC ACADEMY. END FYI.Y.
